description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Analyzers that runs on every pull request, push, and published release. Use two jobs, one on ubuntu-latest and one on windows-latest, each with a matrix strategy to run different static analysis tools (clang-analyzer, iwyu, CodeQL, and msvc-code-analysis) in both Release and Debug configurations. For each job, check out the repository, install dependencies, configure the build, and then run the specified analysis tool.
